steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a similarity between two organisms. Both Artemia franciscana and Achromobacter share one key trait: they live in the southern portion of the Great Salt Lake.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "*Artemia franciscana*, a type of crustacean, lives in the Great Salt Lake.": Cannot show a shared feature with only one subject. ✗
  • "Bacteria called *Achromobacter* live in the Great Salt Lake, which is located in Utah.": Same problem. ✗
  • "The Great Salt Lake in Utah is one of the saltiest bodies of water in the world.": Fails to establish any relationship between the two. ✗
  • "Crustaceans called *Artemia franciscana* and bacteria called *Achromobacter* both live in the southern portion of the Great Salt Lake.": Names both organisms and states their shared habitat, directly establishing the similarity. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
